notes: Target segment: 'the sceptical prospect' -- someone who has already found /performance and is looking for reasons to distrust it. Their JTBD is 'help me falsify this before I trust it'. Content order MUST be dead-first: the receipt trail comes before any 'alive' verdict; that inversion is the entire trust move. FDR + pre-registration explainer is a collapsed <details> block so it doesn't dominate first-scroll but is one click away.
review_criteria: Timeline shape: newest at top, month sticky headers, verdict pill leftmost
'Dead' and 'stopped' cards must be visually equivalent to 'alive' cards -- no down-weighting
Mobile 375 px: cards stack, month headers stay sticky, verdict pill wraps above title
